title: Production Agent Loop and Goal Capstone · State Clinic: Architecture Choice
summary: Build a safe goal-driven agent for a realistic repository or operations task. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops architecture choice increment in a production-ready agent-loop reference implementation. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose workflow or agent patterns and justify complexity from task uncertainty.
Expose current phase, next wake condition, authority, costs, and safe interventions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

steps.title: Predict Architecture Choice
steps.instruction:

content.title: Worked case pattern

steps.title: Build Architecture Choice evidence
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: loops-architecture-choice-1tijka" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Architecture Choice into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: loops-architecture-choice-1tijka
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
